release.name: Bug Fixes & Improvements
release.body:
修复了若干体验问题。喝了很多美式，熬了很多夜，撸了很多猫。

⚠️注意：由于快捷键机制做了调整，旧版插件的快捷键可能失效，烦请访问 `chrome://extensions/shortcuts` 重新设置下。如有不便，敬请谅解！
## Features

* 优化了自动补全的交互逻辑，新增了对数字 url 的补全支持
* 聚焦搜索浮窗现在尺寸固定，不受网页缩放影响。Lumno 内置三种尺寸，可在 `设置/外观` 中切换

* * *

Fixed a handful of experience hiccups. This update was fueled by countless Americanos, late-night coding sessions, and extensive cat-petting.

⚠️ Important Update: We've made some changes to how shortcuts work, which might have reset your current settings. Kindly head over to `chrome://extensions/shortcuts` to set them up again. Thanks for your understanding!
## Features

* Smarter Autocomplete: Refined interaction logic and added support for numeric URLs.
* Consistent Focus Search: The Command Bar now maintains a fixed size regardless of page zoom.
